---
title: "Caracal Distribution"
author: "Grethen de Waal"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


The urban caracal experiences significant anthropogenic challenges that impact their territories, foraging and lifespans. 

This chart compares Cape Peninsula caracal distribution data collected by the [Urban Caracal Project](https://www.urbancaracal.org/) (accessed on 26-02-2026 via [Movebank](https://www.movebank.org/cms/webapp?gwt_fragment=page=studies,path=study1832666571)) and caracal sightings reported on [iNaturalist](https://www.inaturalist.org/observations?place_id=123155&subview=map&taxon_id=42042) (accessed 27-02-2026).
